results.rendered_html:
ahita (3. a + hita)
1〉 adj.
a〉 nicht gestellt, nicht festgesetzt u. s. w. s. u. dhā.
— b〉 ungeeignet, untauglich: ahitena cidarvatā jīradānuḥ sipāsati  ṚV. 8,51,2 . hitāhitān — strīvivāhān  M. 3,20 .
— c〉 nicht vortheilhaft, nachtheilig, schädlich  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR.   ŚAT. BR. 2,5,2,20 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 5,5,9 .  SUŚR. 1,72,15. fgg.  utpātān  R. 3,30,2 .
— 2〉 m. Feind  AK. 2,8,1,11 . 2,64   H. 729 . tavāhitāḥ  BHAG. 2,36 .  RAGH. 4,28 . 11,68 .
— 3〉 n. Schaden: kimeṣaḥ — sūkṣmamapyahitaṃ kartuṃ mama śaktaḥ  R. 5,91,2 .

results.rendered_html:
ahita a.
1 Not placed, put, or fixed.
2 Unfit, improper;  Ms. 3. 20. 
3 Hurtful, detrimental, harmful, injurious, prejudicial.
4 Disadvantageous, evil.
5 Inimical, hostile.
— taḥ An enemy; ahitānaniloddhūtaistarjayanniva ketubhiḥ  R. 4. 28 , 9. 17 , 11. 68 ; tadahitayuvaterabhīkṣṇamakṣṇoḥ  Śi. 7. 57  a rival;  Bg. 2. 36 ;  K. 5 , 77. 
— taṃ
1 Damage.
2 Food.
Comp.
— icchu a. not wishing well, malevolent.
— kārin a. inimical, acting unkindly.
— nāman a. having as yet no name assigned.
— manas a. not friendly minded, hating, inimical.
— hitaṃ good and evil; ˚vicāraśūnyabuddhi  H. 2. 45.
